dtd.17.11.2023 issued by the High Court of Madhya Pradesh, 
set aside as against the PwD candidates – The appellant-‘AY’ in 
SLP (C) No.12179 of 2024 and similarly placed persons are entitled 
to be considered for participating in the selection process in the light 
of this decision. [Paras 46, 67.1(iii), 68(ii)]
Madhya Pradesh Judicial Service Examination (Recruitment 
and Conditions of Service) Rules, 1994 – 2023 Amendment – 
r.19 – Relaxation in cut-off marks – Relaxation in assessing the 
suitability of PwD candidates when adequate PwD candidates 
are not available, after selection in their respective category – 
Permissibility: 
Held: Relaxation of minimum marks is permissible in law – PwDs are 
to be identified as a separate class in itself and therefore, some kind 
of benefits has to be extended to them with respect to eligibility which 
was extended similarly to other vertical reserved class – Relaxation 
in marks can be given to PwD candidates – This relaxation in
